name: com.juanmathe.llmcharacters
description: Connect Unity NPCs to Claude (Anthropic), Ollama, and other LLMs for natural in-game conversations with real-time token streaming. Features dynamic layered context, sliding history window, typewriter dialogue UI, and a provider interface for easy backend swapping.

samples.description: A minimal scene with two NPCs (one on Anthropic, one on Ollama), dialogue UI, and a WeatherController showing dynamic world context injection.
